title: ESMP - Standard
description: A modpack with performance, visuals, and quality-of-life mods, made for the ESMP Minecraft Server to enhance your experience.
body:
# ESMP - Standard Modpack


This Modpack is made for the ESMP players with performance in mind. 

---

This modpack will improve the experience on the server due to the performance mods & Voice Chat Mod to communicate through Proximity Chat in-game with other players.

---

We have also added a few Mods for some basic gameplay changes.

This is a completely Optional modpack. It is not needed in order to join the server but it does improve the experience on the server.

---

The Modpack is similar to the Light version, However it has some extra Mods that improve the experience such as Shaders Support and Rougly Enough Items to provide players with an easy way to see all available items & recipes.

---

**Some of the mods included are:**

- **Sodium**: Boosts FPS and performance.  
- **Sodium Extra**: More settings for Sodium.  
- **Xaero’s World Map**: Full-screen map with waypoints.  
- **Xaero’s Minimap**: In-game minimap with markers.  
- **Reese’s Sodium Options**: Better Sodium settings menu.  
- **Held Item Info**: Shows item stats in-hand.  
- **Resourcify**: Converts packs for server use.  
- **Entity Culling**: Hides unseen entities for FPS boost.  
- **Dynamic Fullbright**: Toggleable brightness boost.  
- **Roughly Enough Items**: Item search and recipes.  
- **Better Statistics Screen**: Enhanced stats menu.  
- **Iris Shaders**: Adds shader support to Sodium.  
- **Mod Menu**: UI for managing installed mods.  
- **Simple Voice Chat**: Proximity-based voice chat.  
- **Bobby**: View distant server chunks.

---


**Light version >>** [ESMP - Light](https://modrinth.com/modpack/esmp_light 'ESMP - Light')
